kw.name: Abrir navegador na página do BitPulse
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: CT01 - Porta AND com entradas validas deve retornar saída

kw.name: Dado que o usuário seleciona a porta
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=gate' by value AND.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: E define a entrada A como
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=inputA' by value 1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: E define a entrada B como
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=inputB' by value 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

test.name: CT02 - Porta invalida deve retornar erro

kw.name: Dado que o usuário seleciona a porta
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=gate' by value AND.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: E define a entrada A como
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=inputA' by value 1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: E define a entrada B como
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=inputB' by value 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

test.name: CT03 - Entrada A invalida deve retornar erro

kw.name: Dado que o usuário seleciona a porta
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=gate' by value AND.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: E define a entrada A como
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=inputA' by value 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: E define a entrada B como
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=inputB' by value 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

test.name: CT04 - Entrada B invalida deve retornar erro

kw.name: Dado que o usuário seleciona a porta
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=gate' by value AND.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: E define a entrada A como
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=inputA' by value 1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: E define a entrada B como
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=inputB' by value 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
